title: neptunia polyphylla
intro: Neptunia polyphylla, also known as the "water morning glory," is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. Traditionally, Neptunia polyphylla has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Neptunia polyphylla can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or dried and used in capsules or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
